docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT RUBEN, DOMINGUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUBEN, DOMINGUEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUBEN, DOMINGUEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO THE CITY TOW RETURNED--NO FORWARD ORDER ON FILE
